Keynote Speaker, Dave Delaney

AI for Small Business

AI Without the Overwhelm: Practical AI Training for Small Businesses

This is not an AI tools workshop. It's a confidence and clarity workshop for small businesses that want to use AI without feeling overwhelmed, behind, or reckless.

Now Booking

You don't need to become an AI expert. You need to become an informed operator. You know AI matters. You just don't know where to start.

This hands-on workshop is for owners and teams who want clarity, confidence, and real-world use cases — not jargon or fear-based FOMO — from a former Google Speaker who gets it, Dave Delaney. Delaney sits at the intersection of communication, leadership, and technology, helping people adopt new tools without losing their values, voice, or humanity. Dave helps people feel calm and capable in moments of change.

This workshop is for you if:

  • You keep hearing “use AI or fall behind,” but no one explains how
  • You've tried ChatGPT once or twice and felt… underwhelmed or confused
  • You're worried about data privacy, accuracy, or using AI the wrong way
  • You don't want to automate everything; you want to work smarter
  • You'd rather ask “good questions” than chase shiny tools

After this AI workshop, participants will:

  • Understand what AI is and is not in plain language
  • Know where AI fits (and doesn't) in a small business
  • Learn how to write better prompts by thinking better, not longer
  • Identify 3–5 low-risk, high-value ways AI can save time immediately
  • Develop an ethical, human-centered approach to using AI at work
  • Feel confident evaluating future tools instead of feeling behind

What to expect:

  • No jargon, no coding, no pressure to perform
  • Real examples from small businesses, not Silicon Valley
  • Live demos you can follow along with or just observe
  • Time for questions you've been afraid to ask
  • A practical workbook or takeaway you can actually reuse

Get clarity on AI for your business

You don't need to move fast. You need to move intentionally, and this AI workshop will leave you feeling enlightened, empowered, and entertained.

Now Booking
“Communication isn’t a soft skill. It’s a superpower.”

— Dave Delaney, powered by Futureforth.

  • Coaching
  • Presentations

  • Contact

Dave Delaney is an internationally recognized keynote speaker, leadership consultant, and communication strategist. As the founder of Futureforth, he works with organizations to improve employee retention, build inclusive workplace cultures, and enhance communication across hybrid, remote, and in-person teams. He speaks on topics such as neurodiversity in leadership, modern communication strategies, and connection-driven team building.
